title: Fix error of invalid operands of types unsigned int and sc_core::sc_signal_inout_if sc_dt

features.name: systemc_sc_bv_signal_bitwise_and_with_constant
features.description: Code should include a SystemC-integrated signal with sc_bv type used in a bitwise AND operation with a hex constant
features.snippet:
logic [1387:0] cnoc_maxi_req; // sc_bv<1388> after SystemC integration
initial cnoc_maxi_req = cnoc_maxi_req & 32'hfffffffc;

features.name: systemc_signal_array_element_in_bitwise_expression
features.description: Code should include an array element of a SystemC-integrated signal used in a bitwise expression with a constant, where the array element is on the left side of the operator
